threshold_source: e02s02 sections 14-16; no epic-level numeric test plan exists

performance.criterion: Affected approval, agent, tool, and sandbox security suite completes in under 1 second

reliability.criterion: Approved execution starts once; denied and invalid execution starts zero processes; full regression stays green
reliability.actual: User-confirmed approve/deny sentinels passed; 120 project tests and 9 example tests passed

operability.criterion: Users receive explicit bounded execution context and correlated denial reasons without raw controls
operability.actual: CLI prompt displayed interpreter, workspace, file, arguments, and count; denial returned approval_denied/user_denied
